entities.name: GLOBAL THEME ON CROP IMPROVEMENT, MANAGEMENT AND UTILIZATION FOR FOOD SECURITY AND HEALTH
entities.description: An initiative aiming to contribute to sustainable growth in crop production, farm income, food security, and environmental protection.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE GROWTH IN CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The goal of increasing crop yields in a sustainable manner.

entities.name: FARM INCOME
entities.description: The financial earnings generated from farming activities.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of protecting the natural environment.

entities.name: IMPROVED AND DIVERSIFIED CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties developed for better performance and diversity.

entities.name: ECO-FRIENDLY AND COST-EFFECTIVE PEST MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural practices used to control pests that are environmentally sustainable and economically viable.

entities.name: COMMERCIALIZATION OF DIVERSIFIED AND ALTERNATIVE USES OF CROP PRODUCE
entities.description: The process of bringing alternative uses of crop products to the market.
